pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from 1.8 to 21 to support Java 21.
Upgrade Spring Boot version to 3.4.1, which requires Java 17+ and aligns with the Java 21 migration.
Convert the project from a single module to a multi-module parent POM structure.
Remove the Guava dependency, likely replacing its functionality with standard Java 21 features or other libraries.
Remove the Vavr test dependency, simplifying the test stack.
Upgrade AssertJ to version 3.27.3 for better compatibility with modern Java and testing practices.
Upgrade Maven Compiler Plugin to 3.13.0 to ensure proper support for Java 21 compilation features.
Upgrade Maven Surefire Plugin to 3.5.2 to support running tests on Java 21.
Add Jacoco plugin for code coverage reporting.
Add Flatten Maven Plugin to manage multi-module POM flattening for OSS releases.
Add Coveralls plugin for continuous integration coverage reporting.
Configure release profile with GPG signing, source/javadoc attachment, and Nexus staging for OSS distribution.
Update project groupId, artifactId, and version to reflect the new project structure and release cycle.
Add SCM, distribution management, and issue management metadata for repository and release configuration.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add the Maven Versions Plugin backup file to .gitignore to prevent committing generated artifacts.

.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.properties.general_idea: Update the Maven Wrapper version to 3.3.4 to support newer distribution types and security features.
Switch Maven distribution type to 'only-script' to download only the necessary scripts rather than the full binary archive.
Upgrade the bundled Maven version from 3.5.0 to 3.9.11 to ensure compatibility with modern build requirements and JDK 21.

README.md.general_idea: Add build status, Maven Central, and coverage badges to the README header.
Add links to Swift, Rust, and Go implementations of the library.
Replace single-line description with comprehensive documentation including usage examples, use cases, and integration guides.
README.md.human_impl: Added sections for 'What is the FriendlyID library?', 'Why use a FriendlyID?', 'Use cases', 'Dependencies', 'Usage', and 'Integrations'.

README.md.general_idea: Update the dependency version in the documentation to reflect the latest release.

mvnw.general_idea: Replace the legacy Maven Wrapper startup script with the modern version 3.3.4 to support native Maven Daemon (mvnd) and improved download mechanisms.
mvnw.human_impl: diff --git a/mvnw b/mvnw ... # Apache Maven Wrapper startup batch script, version 3.3.4

mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Replace the legacy Maven Wrapper batch script with the modern version 3.3.4 that uses PowerShell for cross-platform compatibility and improved download logic.
mvnw.cmd.human_impl: Replaced entire content of mvnw.cmd with new script starting with '<# : batch portion' and 'Apache Maven Wrapper startup batch script, version 3.3.4'

mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Remove the executable permission bit from the Windows batch file, as it is not required on Windows and often causes confusion in cross-platform repositories.
